name: @firstpick/pi-skill-paper-summarizer
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for academic or technical papers, arXiv/PubMed/IEEE/ACM links, PDFs, methodology review, limitations, practical implications, or extracting findings for engineering decisions.
description_zh: 代理应在学术论文或技术论文、arXiv/PubMed/IEEE/ACM 链接、PDF、方法论审查、局限性、实际含义或为工程决策提取发现时调用此技能。
